Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mordecai D. Boone of GORDON & REES LLP (415-986-5900), appearing for defendant / moving party Hennessy Industries, Inc.
Andrew Chew of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Milton Godbee, Edward Schlimmer, Edward Santa, Joseph Rieser, and William Bettencourt / Rita Bettencourt, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT HENNESSY INDUSTRIES INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IN THE FOLLOWING CASES: MILTON GODBEE (#275142), EDWARD SCHLIMMER (#275231), EDWARD SANTA (#275314), JOSEPH RIESER (#275794) AND WILLIAM BETTENCOURT / RITA BETTENCOURT, ET AL. (#454966)

Prior to this hearing the parties made the following stipulations and so ordered by the Court: Both sides stipulate that the parties can apply one argument and the same ruling on Hennessy's summary judgment motions in the Godbee, Schlimmer and the Santa cases. The parties further stipulate to advance the 2/27/14 hearings on defendant Hennessy Industries, Inc.'s motions for summary judgment, or in the alternative summary adjudication in the Rieser and Bettencourt cases to 2/26/14. The parties further stipulate that same argument and same ruling in the Godbee, et al. cases can also be applied to these two cases.
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Hennessy Industries, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication are denied. Defendant sustained its initial burden. The declaration of Rudy Limpert creates a triable issue whether defendant is liable for plaintiff's alleged exposure to asbestos attributable to defendant's Ammco brake grinding machine. While such machine itself did not contain asbestos or asbestos-containing component parts, there is a triable issue whether defendant owed a duty to plaintiff. Plaintiff's objections to the declarations of Craig Mountz and Russell Darnell are overruled. Orders in Godbee, Schlimmer and Santa were signed in open court. Counsel for plaintiffs Milton Rieser and William Bettencourt, et al, to prepare orders in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Dana Freed of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #10602 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
